channel.title: dotnet/windowsdesktop Pull Requests
channel.description: Pull Requests from https://github.com/dotnet/windowsdesktop, generated by https://github.com/meziantou/IssuesToRss/

item.title: PR: Update SDK version to match WinForms and WPF - @ryalanms
PR: [Release/5.0] Windows Desktop Runtime installer for arm64 should also include the .NET runtime - @ryalanms
item.description:
Customer Impact

Windows Desktop ARM64 applications that are not published as self-contained require both the Runtime and Windows Desktop Runtime (or the SDK) to be installed on the ARM64 machine.

The current Windows Desktop Runtime installer only contains:

Microsoft Windows Desktop Runtime

The installer should also include the .NET Runtime:

Microsoft .NET Host Microsoft .NET Host FX Resolver Microsoft .NET Runtime

https://github.com/dotnet/windowsdesktop/issues/1823

Regression?

No. WindowsDesktop ARM64 support was added in 5.0.8.

(The Windows Desktop Runtime in .NET 6.0 contains the Runtime.)

Risk

Very low. This is a single-line change to include the Runtime in the Windows Desktop Runtime installer.

Testing

The new Windows Desktop Runtime installer was tested manually on a Surface Pro X (ARM64 device) with no runtimes/SDKs installed. The four components (wd runtime, host, host fx resolver, and runtime) now install and uninstall correctly.

item.title: PR: WindowsDesktop relies on some refpack changes not in p6. Build against p7 instead. - @ryalanms
item.description:
WindowsDesktop relies on some refpack changes not in p6. Build against p7 instead.

Update global.json to 6.0.100-preview.7.21364.30.

item.title: PR: Build against version Preview 6 of the .NET SDK - @ryalanms
item.description: Build against version Preview 6 of the .NET SDK. WindowsDesktop is currently building against Preview 4. WinForms and WPF are building against Preview 6.

item.title: PR: Coworking session with Devendar to unblock darc - @ryalanms
item.description:
Fixes https://github.com/dotnet/core-eng/issues/13727.

/cc @dotnet/wpf-developers

We missed cherry-picking these commits to main from preview 6:

https://github.com/dotnet/windowsdesktop/pull/1742/commits/aef1b35e5575ed3dfe255ffbf1b00deec42a8c71 https://github.com/dotnet/windowsdesktop/pull/1742/commits/4235f4005907fe00eb16e2f11f392a58a63a7ffc

item.title: PR: Merging internal commits for release/5.0 - @vseanreesermsft
PR: Add back Microsoft.Win32.Registry.AccessControl to WindowsDesktop targeting pack - @ryalanms
item.description: Add back Microsoft.Win32.Registry.AccessControl to WindowsDesktop targeting pack and fix ProjectServicingConfiguration Patch version.

item.title: PR: Remove new Microsoft.NETCore.App.Ref targeting pack assemblies from WindowsDesktop targeting pack - @ryalanms
item.description:
Required by:

Expose missing references which are present in the runtime and in packages in the targeting pack #54147: https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/pull/54147

Remove new Microsoft.NETCore.App.Ref targeting pack assemblies from WindowsDesktop targeting packs, and update versions.props to rebuild WindowsDesktop targeting packs.
